active_directory_id.description: The ID of the Active Directory to which the file system is joined.

aliases.description: A list of DNS aliases associated with the file system.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the file system.

audit_log_configuration.description: Configuration for audit logging, including destination and log levels for file access.

automatic_backup_retention_days.description: The number of days automatic backups are retained.

backup_id.description: The ID of the backup associated with the file system.

copy_tags_to_backups.description: Indicates whether tags on the file system should be copied to backups.

daily_automatic_backup_start_time.description: The daily time when automatic backups are scheduled to start.

deployment_type.description: The deployment type of the file system, such as MULTI_AZ_1 or SINGLE_AZ_1.

disk_iops_configuration.description: Configuration for disk IOPS, including the number of IOPS and mode.

dns_name.description: The DNS name of the file system.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key used to encrypt the file system.

network_interface_ids.description: A list of IDs of the network interfaces created for the file system.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the file system owner.

preferred_file_server_ip.description: The preferred IP address of the file server.

preferred_subnet_id.description: The ID of the preferred subnet for the file system.

security_group_ids.description: A list of security group IDs associated with the file system.

skip_final_backup.description: Indicates whether to skip creating a final backup when deleting the file system.

storage_capacity.description: The storage capacity of the file system in gigabytes (GB).

storage_type.description: The type of storage used, such as SSD or HDD.

subnet_ids.description: A list of subnet IDs where the file system is deployed.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the file system.

throughput_capacity.description: The throughput capacity of the file system in megabytes per second (MBps).

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC that the file system is associated with.

weekly_maintenance_start_time.description: The preferred start time for weekly maintenance, in the format d:HH:MM.
